items.question: Which messaging channels does Chatblix's unified inbox support?
items.answer: Chatblix connects WhatsApp Business, Instagram DMs, Facebook Messenger, Telegram, TikTok DMs, and email through the official Meta and TikTok Business APIs. One inbox, every channel — no scraping, no fragile browser plugins.

items.question: How does the AI customer support actually reply to messages?
items.answer: Our AI is trained on your brand voice, FAQs, and past conversations, so replies sound like your team — not a generic bot. It can draft replies for review or send them directly, and it escalates to a human the moment confidence drops.

items.question: Is my customer data safe and private?
items.answer: All conversations are encrypted in transit and at rest, and hosted on SOC 2-aligned infrastructure. We never train foundation models on your data, and you can export or delete everything at any time.

items.question: How much does Chatblix cost?
items.answer: Plans start with a free 14-day trial — no credit card required — then scale based on AI replies, not the number of seats. Your whole team can collaborate in the shared WhatsApp business inbox without per-user fees.

items.question: Can my whole team share the same inbox?
items.answer: Yes. Assign chats, leave internal notes, @mention teammates, and see exactly who replied to what across every social media DM channel. Admins get live workload, response-time, and CSAT dashboards built in.

items.question: How long does setup and onboarding take?
items.answer: Most teams are live in under 10 minutes. Connect your Meta and TikTok Business accounts, import your FAQs, and your AI starts handling DMs the same afternoon.

items.question: Does Chatblix integrate with my CRM and other tools?
items.answer: Out-of-the-box integrations cover HubSpot, Salesforce, Shopify, Zapier, and Slack — plus a REST API and webhooks for everything else. Sync contact data in, push conversation history out, and trigger workflows automatically.

items.question: Is there a mobile app for iOS and Android?
items.answer: Yes — native iOS and Android apps with push notifications, voice replies, and offline drafts. Manage WhatsApp, Instagram, and Messenger DMs from anywhere, even on patchy connections.
